name: Control D Utility
description: DNS/network control utility GUI app , companion to ctrld CLI daemon

download.note: GUI auto-updates in-app. The ctrld GitHub repo publishes CLI tarballs only — no macOS .app/.dmg for MacUpdater to install.

changelog.note: Changelog from CLI daemon releases on GitHub

notes: The GUI app auto-updates with no public Sparkle feed or version endpoint. The controld.com website is Cloudflare-protected (404 to automated fetchers). No Mac App Store , web-only distribution. The CLI daemon (ctrld) is open-source on GitHub with proper release versioning. Mapping GUI version to CLI version is approximate. MacUpdater can report approximate CLI release versions but cannot install updates.
